title: rubus lejeunei var. oblongatus
intro: Rubus lejeunei var. oblongatus is a plant species within the Rubus genus, also known as the black raspberry, characterized by its unique oblong fruit. The leaves and stems of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to their antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus lejeunei var. oblongatus are numerous, including its ability to protect against cancer, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Rubus lejeunei var. oblongatus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
